title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 23 2025
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 23 2025
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 23 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 23/01/2025
Today, iron ore futures moved downwards after a higher opening, fluctuating throughout the day. The most-tradedI2505 contract finally closed at 801.5 yuan/mt, up 0.44% for the day. Traders followed the market trend to sell cargoes, while steel mill inquiries decreased.
